shortDescription: Character-filled 3-bedroom detached residence in Little Italy featuring original details and modern upgrades.
fullDescription: Welcome to 632 College Street in the vibrant Little Italy neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. All 3 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Close to waterfront trails and cycling paths
Pot lights and designer fixtures throughout
